title: Experiences and Visits to San Francisco
content: I lived in San Rafael to the North! and my family still lives there. I try to visit San Francisco at least twice a year, summer and on my birthday.I❤️SF

title: Instagram
content: By continuing, you agree to Instagram's Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. • Morning: Start with a visit to the Golden Gate Bridge. Head to Battery Spencer for the best views of the bridge with the city skyline. • Late Morning: Explore the Palace of Fine Arts, a stunning neoclassical monument with a peaceful lagoon. • Evening: End the day with a cable car ride from Powell & Market for that classic San Francisco experience. • Evening: Relax at the Japanese Tea Garden in Golden Gate Park—a peaceful spot to end your San Francisco adventure.
